title: Basic Meeting Agenda Planner
scenario: Create a meeting agenda planning tool that takes in a meeting topic, date, time, and a list of attendees. The tool should output a formatted meeting agenda with the topic, date, time, and a list of attendees with their roles. Ensure the format meets standard business meeting agenda requirements.
constraints: Must use standard business meeting agenda formatting

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated markdown adheres to the constraints.
Check if the generated markdown is correctly formatted.
Check if the meeting topic, date, time, and attendees are included in the output.
